app.name: MedFlow
app.syntheticNotice: All data in this environment is synthetic. No real patient information is present.

login.title: Sign in to MedFlow
login.subtitle: Clinician access to the synthetic care platform.
login.smartRedirect: Redirecting to your identity provider for SMART on FHIR authorization.
login.demoHint: Demo: any username and password are accepted in this synthetic environment.
login.invalid: Enter a username and password to continue.

worklist.title: Risk-ranked worklist
worklist.subtitle: Patients ordered by primary risk. Live alerts promote patients to the top.
worklist.caption: Worklist of patients with current risk scores, sortable by column.
worklist.emptyDesc: When patients are assigned and scored, they will appear here.
worklist.promoted: {name} was promoted due to a live alert.

patient.revealDesc: Revealing the full medical record number is logged and reviewed. Provide a clinical justification.
patient.justificationPlaceholder: e.g. Confirming identity before administering medication for encounter 4821.
patient.revealed: Full MRN revealed. This access has been recorded.
patient.revealError: Break-glass request was denied or failed.

vitals.title: Vital signs
vitals.emptyDesc: Live readings appear here as the wearable streams arrive.
vitals.summary: Line chart of {metric} over the selected time window.

risk.title: Risk assessment
risk.shapSummary: Horizontal bar chart of the five features contributing most to the {model} score.
risk.noCdsDesc: CDS Hooks services returned no cards for this patient.

imaging.title: Imaging
imaging.emptyDesc: No ImagingStudy resources or instances were found for this patient.
imaging.noHeatmap: Run the model to generate a saliency overlay.
imaging.viewerError: The imaging viewer could not initialize in this environment. Controls remain available.

notes.title: Clinical notes
notes.emptyDesc: DocumentReference notes for this patient will appear on this timeline.
notes.author: Author

messages.title: Messages
messages.emptyDesc: Start a thread with the care team below.

cohort.title: Cohort builder
cohort.subtitle: Compose inclusion criteria and preview an aggregate, de-identified count.
cohort.ageHistogramSummary: Bar chart of patient counts by age bucket.
cohort.genderPieSummary: Pie chart of the cohort by gender.
cohort.noResult: Adjust criteria to preview a cohort.

audit.title: Audit log
audit.subtitle: Tamper-evident, hash-chained record of every access.
audit.caption: Audit events with actor, action and resource, ordered most recent first.
audit.chainValid: Hash chain verified — the audit log is intact.
audit.chainInvalid: Hash chain verification FAILED — possible tampering detected.
audit.empty: No audit events match these filters

models.title: Model governance
models.subtitle: Production and canary versions, performance, drift and fairness.
models.noModelsDesc: The model registry returned no entries.
models.sparklineSummary: Sparkline of recent AUROC measurements for {model}.

errors.boundaryDesc: The data could not be displayed. You can retry or go back.
errors.notFoundDesc: The page you requested does not exist.
